excluded_categories.reason: No authentication or permission requirements are specified beyond account creation.
No UI behavior, messages, loading state, or empty state are mentioned in the requirement analysis.
No dependencies are explicitly identified in the requirement analysis.
No network-related requirements or dependencies are specified.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive test cases for successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length.
Generate negative test cases for account creation with duplicate email (business rule BR001).
Generate negative test cases for password less than 8 characters (validation VAL002).
Generate boundary test cases for password length at exactly 8 characters and just below (7 characters).
Include security test cases for user input (email and password) to check for injection or malformed data, as user input is present.

Do not generate test cases for email format validation, password complexity, password confirmation, error messages, account verification, or allowed characters, as these are missing information and listed as clarification items.
